name: clarification loop: the mapped concern is a known concept that translates to architecture
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/explain.sh" --clarify "a=our stored data must stay safe even if the disk is stolen" 2>&1 | grep -q 'mapped_to=encryption_at_rest' && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/explain.sh" --list-terms 2>/dev/null | node -e 'const a=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync(0,"utf8"));process.exit(a.includes("encryption_at_rest")?0:1)' && echo translatable 1>&2
